reviews.comment:
Un baño solo habilitado. El personal pidió disculpas pero no tenían xq veo que es recurrente en otros comentarios. Paras, gastas y el servicio no es acorde

(Translated by Google)
Only one bathroom was available. The staff apologized, but it was pointless, as I see this is a recurring issue in other reviews. You stop, you spend money, and the service is subpar.

reviews.comment:
Atención mediocre. Y nafta extremadamente mala. 10lts de nafta que no sirvieron para nada. Tuve que volver en grua. NADA RECOMENDABLE EL COMBUSTIBLE

(Translated by Google)
Mediocre service. And extremely bad gasoline. 10 liters of gasoline that were completely useless. I had to be towed back. I DO NOT RECOMMEND THE FUEL AT ALL.
